---
title: "Daily Training Load Summary"
output:
  pdf_document:
    df_print: default
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: "letterpaper,margin=0.5in"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{titling}
  - \setlength{\droptitle}{-60pt}          
  - \pretitle{\begin{center}\small}       
  - \posttitle{\end{center}\vspace{-4pt}}  
params:
  report_date:    !r as.Date("2025-02-03")
  day_gps_data:    NULL
  day_well_data:   NULL
  team_daily:      NULL
  weekly_summary:  NULL
---


```{r date_line, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(sprintf(
  "\\vspace{-10em}\n\\begin{center}\\small %s\\end{center}\n",
  format(params$report_date, "%b %d, %Y")
))

```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Setup
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, error = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica"))

report_date    <- params$report_date
day_gps_data   <- params$day_gps_data
day_well_data  <- params$day_well_data
team_daily     <- params$team_daily
weekly_summary <- params$weekly_summary

```


```{r distance, echo=FALSE}
# Create Total Distance Plot
day_gps_data <- day_gps_data %>%
  mutate(
    TD_km  = TD / 1000,
    HSR_pct = 100 * HSR / TD,
    HSR_y   = pmax(TD_km * HSR_pct / 100, TD_km * 0.05)
  )

TD_plot <- ggplot(day_gps_data, aes(x = reorder(Name, -TD_km), y = TD_km)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#E69F00", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(TD_km, 1)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size  = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(y = HSR_y, label = paste0(round(HSR_pct, 0), "%")),
    color = "black",
    size = 3, angle = 90
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Distance with % High-Speed Running",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total Distance (km)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1.25, size = 7),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "grey30"),
    plot.margin  = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 5),
    plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0, colour = "grey30")
  )

```


```{r acwr, echo=FALSE}
# Create ACWR Plot
acwr_plot <- ggplot(day_gps_data, aes(x = Name, y = ACWR, fill = ACWR)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c("#B71C1C", "darkgreen", "#E3B506", "#B71C1C")
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8,  linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.3,  linetype = "dashed", color = "#E3B506") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.5,  linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  labs(
    title = "Acute to Chronic Workload Ratio",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 2, l = 5),
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0, color = "grey30"),
    legend.text     = element_text(color = "grey30"),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45),
    geom_col(width = 0.6)
  )

```


```{r wellness, echo=FALSE}
# Create Wellness Plot
day_well_data2 <- day_well_data %>%
  mutate(
    ColorCat = case_when(
      Wellness < 13 ~ "Low",
      Wellness < 17 ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE          ~ "High"
    )
  )

wellness_plot <- ggplot(day_well_data2, aes(x = Wellness, y = Name, fill = ColorCat)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(Wellness, 1)),
    hjust = -0.2,
    size  = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Low"      = "#B71C1C",
      "Moderate" = "#E3B506",
      "High"     = "#238B45"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 25),
    breaks = seq(0, 25, by = 5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wellness",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 5),
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0, colour = "grey30")
  )

```


```{r summary, echo = FALSE}
# Create Weekly Distance Table Summary 

txt <- c(
  "Week Start",
  format(weekly_summary$`Week Start`[1], "%b %d, %Y"),
  "Avg Distance To Date",
  round(as.numeric(weekly_summary$`Avg Distance To Date`[1]), 1),
  "Avg HSR To Date",
  round(as.numeric(weekly_summary$'Avg HSR To Date'[1], 1)),
  "Week Goal",
  round(as.numeric(weekly_summary$`Week Goal`[1]), 1)
)

weekly_table_data <- data.frame(
  Text = txt,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

weekly_table <- tableGrob(
  weekly_table_data,
  rows = NULL, 
  cols = NULL
)

bold_rows <- c(1, 3, 5, 7)
for (i in bold_rows) {
  weekly_table$grobs[[i]]$gp <- grid::gpar(fontface = "bold")
}

```


```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
# Push the whole block down
cat("\\vspace*{0.5cm}\n")
```


```{r build_combined, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Save Plots as Grid For .pdf
library(ggpubr)

row1 <- ggarrange(TD_plot, ncol = 1, nrow = 1)

row2 <- ggarrange(acwr_plot, ncol = 1, nrow = 1)

row3 <- ggarrange(
  wellness_plot,
  weekly_table,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(2, 1)   
)

combined <- ggarrange(
  row1,
  row2,
  row3,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 3,
  heights = c(1.1, 1.3, 1)  
)

```


```{r save_combined, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggsave(
  filename = "combined_plot.pdf",
  plot     = combined,
  width    = 7.5,   
  height   = 10,    
  units    = "in"
)
```


```{r include_combined, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat('
\\vspace*{-0.3cm}
\\begin{center}
\\includegraphics[width=\\textwidth,height=0.95\\textheight,keepaspectratio]{combined_plot.pdf}
\\end{center}
')
```
